title: adicea ciliaris
intro: Adicea ciliaris, also known as the lemongrass, is a tropical plant that belongs to the grass family (Poaceae) and is native to Southeast Asia. The medicinal properties of Adicea ciliaris include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal agent, which can help to reduce fever and soothe digestive issues. The health benefits of using Adicea ciliaris include its potential to aid in weight loss, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Adicea ciliaris can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, essential oils, and capsules, making it easily accessible for its benefits to be utilized.
